roles.title: Roles
roles.select_prompt: Select a role from the list.

permissions.intro: Admin and Super Admin bypass all checks. Configure other roles.
permissions.hint: Data access grants what users can do. Menus are configured under Navigation.

navigation.intro: Admin and Super Admin see all navigation. Configure other roles.
navigation.select_prompt: Select a role from the sidebar to configure navigation.
navigation.hint: Navigation access controls which menus and links appear. It does not grant data access — use Data access for permissions.
navigation.nav_only_one: This role uses navigation-only rules ({{count}} bundle). Menus show only where toggled below, within what the hospital deployment profile allows (HMS hides HR, Configuration, and some Operations items — use Full suite in Super Admin to show them).
navigation.nav_only_many: This role uses navigation-only rules ({{count}} bundles). Menus show only where toggled below, within what the hospital deployment profile allows (HMS hides HR, Configuration, and some Operations items — use Full suite in Super Admin to show them).
navigation.legacy_hint: No navigation bundles configured yet — menus follow capabilities (legacy). Toggle a section below to switch to navigation-only control.
navigation.confirm_revoke_all: Remove all navigation bundles for this role?
navigation.fine_tune_hint: Hide specific links within a granted section (optional).

portals.intro: Admin and Super Admin can open all portals.
portals.hint: Choose which staff portals {{role}} can open, and which is the Home portal (post-login landing page).
portals.home_hint: The first portal assigned is set as Home automatically. Removing the Home portal promotes the next assigned one.

catalogue.perm_sub: System-wide permission definitions, grouped by module.
catalogue.role_sub: Define and manage hospital staff roles.

audit.title: ACL audit log
audit.subtitle: Permission, portal, navigation, UI visibility, and workflow changes are recorded here.
audit.empty: No audit entries match this filter yet.

workflow.intro: Map clinical pathways to staff portals. Drag a portal pill onto a step. Documentation only — does not grant permissions.

portal_catalog.intro: Portal catalogue defines staff landing pages. After creating a portal, assign it under Role portals and configure tiles under Navigation.
portal_catalog.confirm_delete: Delete portal "{{label}}"? This removes its dashboard tiles.
portal_catalog.director_tip: Hospital Director — use code director, template Executive, then assign portal to role Director (100) and set as Home on the Role portals tab.

modals.copy_replace_hint: Replaces this role's permission grants with the source role's grants.
modals.portal_exists_suffix: Open Role portals tab to assign it, or edit it in the catalogue.
modals.portal_ready_msg: Portal ready. Confirm Access and Home below.
modals.portal_desc_ph: Optional description shown on the portal home page.

nav_studio.hint: Control HMS hub cards, dashboard widgets, accounting bar, top bar, and sidebar for this role. Unchecking hides a link only — permissions still control URL access.
nav_studio.preview_hub: Preview HMS hub as this role
nav_studio.hub_empty: HMS Hub widgets are not in the catalogue yet. Restart the app so ACL schema seeds run.
nav_studio.dash_empty: Dashboard widgets are not in the catalogue yet.
nav_studio.items_empty: Items are not in the catalogue yet.
nav_studio.sidebar_empty: Sidebar items are not in the catalogue yet.
nav_studio.select_role_prompt: Select a non-core staff role (not Admin or Super Admin) to design sidebar and top navigation visibility.
nav_studio.preview_hub_suffix: (opens the main clinical hub with their card layout). Grant capabilities on Modules & permissions first.
nav_studio.deployment_hint: Hospital deployment {{profile}} also hides modules globally. Configure under
nav_studio.hub_desc: HMS Clinical Hub (/hms) — main hospital landing: KPI stats, module cards, and today's OPD panel. Users still need the underlying module permissions (e.g. lab.read) to see a card; unchecking here hides it for this role only.
nav_studio.dash_desc: Hospital dashboard (/dashboard) — stat cards, toolbar links, and panels. Role must also have Dashboard: view main HMS dashboard (dashboard.read) under Modules & permissions.
nav_studio.dash_empty_full: Dashboard widgets are not in the catalogue yet. Restart the app so ACL schema seeds run, then refresh.
nav_studio.hub_empty_full: HMS Hub widgets are not in the catalogue yet. Restart the app so ACL schema seeds run, then refresh.
nav_studio.accounting_desc: Accounting module bar — Cashier, Billing, and Financials (Dashboard, Customers, Transactions, Reporting, Settings).
nav_studio.accounting_empty: Accounting bar items are not in the catalogue yet. Restart the app so ACL schema seeds run, then refresh.
nav_studio.topnav_desc: Main hospital shell top bar (Clinical, Operations, HR, Settings).
nav_studio.js_session_expired: Session expired — please sign in again.
nav_studio.js_network_error: Network error — please reload and try again.

ui_visibility.topnav_desc: Controls the main header menus (Clinical, Operations, HR, Configuration) for role {{role}}. Use Menu on to show or hide an entire dropdown, or toggle individual links below. Permissions are still required — this only changes what appears in the header.
ui_visibility.topnav_example: Example (Cashier): turn off Clinical, HR, and Configuration; keep Operations (Cashier, wallets, etc.).
ui_visibility.sidebar_desc: Left sidebar on every page for {{role}} — separate from the top header bar.
ui_visibility.portal_desc: Shortcut cards and banner buttons (e.g. Workflow Guide) on staff portal home pages for {{role}}. Pick a portal using the tabs below. Hiding Workflow Guide here also hides it from the sidebar and top menu.
ui_visibility.no_tiles: No tiles defined for this portal yet.

action_menus.select_role: Select a staff role on Modules & permissions to configure row menu visibility.
action_menus.no_catalogue: No action menu catalogue found. Restart the app after upgrade so ACL seeds run.
action_menus.title: Row action menus (⋮)
action_menus.desc: Per-screen row actions for {{role}}. Hiding does not grant access — required_perm still applies.

legacy_page.title: Workflow & Access Control
legacy_page.subtitle: Grant capabilities under Modules & permissions. Configure menus under Navigation. Map clinical steps under Workflow. Admin (1) and Super Admin (99) bypass all checks.
legacy_page.steps: 1. Modules — grant permissions per module and sub-capability. 2. Navigation — top tabs, menus, sub-menus, tiles (visibility only). 3. Workflow — OPD/IPD step map (documentation).
legacy_page.drag_portals: DRAG A PORTAL ONTO A STEP:
legacy_page.summary_placeholder: Select a portal above to see its auto-generated workflow summary.
legacy_page.how_to_1: Drag a portal pill onto a step to show which portal handles that stage.
legacy_page.how_to_2: Click × on a badge to remove a portal from that step.
legacy_page.how_to_3: Click the pencil icon on any step to rename it.
legacy_page.how_to_4: Click Add Step to insert a new custom clinical stage.
legacy_page.how_to_5: Portal assignment is documentation only. Grant access under Role access.
legacy_page.modules_desc: Grant or revoke capabilities by module and sub-capability (drag cards or use All / None on each module). This is the only place that grants real access. Configure menus on the Navigation tab.
legacy_page.copy_grants_hint: Copies every permission from the source role onto {{role}} (portals are unchanged).
legacy_page.select_role_left: Select a role from the left to manage permissions.
legacy_page.role_portals_desc: Choose which staff portals {{role}} can open, and which one is its Home (the page they land on after login). Changes apply immediately.
legacy_page.perm_mgr_sub: System-wide granular permission definitions, grouped by module.
legacy_page.role_mgr_sub: Define and manage hospital staff roles.
legacy_page.audit_sub: Every permission grant/revoke, role / portal / UI-visibility change, and workflow designer step edit is recorded here. Filter to narrow down the trail.
legacy_page.audit_empty: No audit entries match this filter yet.
legacy_page.clone_hint: Copies permissions, portal access, Home portal, and any UI hide overrides from the chosen role. The new role's title still needs to be unique.
legacy_page.nav_pick_role: Choose a staff role to configure menus and navigation visibility.
legacy_page.nav_hub_desc: Show or hide header tabs, sidebar links, portal tiles, accounting menus, and row actions. This does not grant access by itself — users also need matching capabilities under Modules & permissions.

js.delete_step_body: Are you sure you want to delete this custom step?
js.no_portals_assigned: No steps have portals assigned yet. Drag portal pills onto steps to assign access.
js.choose_non_admin: Choose a non-admin role on the left.
js.replace_all_body: This will remove every permission currently assigned to this role and copy them from the selected role.
js.delete_perm_body: Are you sure you want to delete this permission? This cannot be undone.
js.delete_role_body: Are you sure you want to delete this role?

subscriptions.title: Solution Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Modules are enabled through annual subscriptions. Request a code, activate it in the ZAIZENS License Generator, then enter the serial here. Hospital deployment profiles update automatically when a serial is activated.
subscriptions.setup_body: license public keys are missing from the server environment. Request codes cannot be generated until you run node scripts/setup-hms-license-env.js and restart HMS.
subscriptions.copy_hint: Copy this code and enter it in the ZAIZENS License Generator. You will receive a serial number to paste into the pending card below.
subscriptions.email_failed: Email could not be sent automatically — copy the code or use mailto below.
subscriptions.smtp_manual: SMTP is not configured — send manually to
subscriptions.licensed_until: Licensed until {{date}}. Renew before expiry to avoid interruption.
subscriptions.expiring_soon: Expiring soon. Generate a new request code to renew for another year.
subscriptions.flash_email_fail: SMTP is configured but email could not be sent — copy the code manually.
subscriptions.license_keys_missing: License public keys are not configured on this server. Run scripts/setup-hms-license-env.js and restart the app.
subscriptions.reset_section_hint: Removes every active, pending, and expired subscription on this hospital. Generates a new installation ID so you can request codes and activate serials on a fresh deployment. Old serial numbers stay tied to the previous installation ID at the vendor.
subscriptions.reset_btn: Clear all licenses & new installation ID
subscriptions.flash_reset: All subscriptions cleared ({{count}}). New installation ID: {{id}}. Request new codes for this server.
subscriptions.revoked_hint: These subscriptions were disabled for security or policy reasons. Request a new code to subscribe again.
subscriptions.deactivate_confirm: Deactivate {{label}}? Module access stops immediately. The same serial cannot be reused.
subscriptions.deactivate_all_hint: Immediately disable every active or pending subscription (keeps audit history). Use when you suspect license tampering or unauthorized access.
subscriptions.license_server_configured: Connected to vendor license server for remote management.
subscriptions.license_server_not_configured: License server URL is not configured. Remote revoke from vendor is disabled.
subscriptions.license_server_not_registered: Not registered yet — sync will register this installation.
subscriptions.license_server_push_missing: Instant push not configured — set HMS_PUBLIC_URL and LICENSE_SERVER_WEBHOOK_SECRET (same on license server).

acl_perms.chart__read: Patient chart: view medical history & chart
acl_perms.chart__write: Patient chart: edit chart data & clinical notes
acl_perms.opd__write: OPD: manage queue, triage & visit actions
acl_perms.maternity__read: Maternity: view ANC registry & obstetric charts
acl_perms.maternity__write: Maternity: record ANC, labor, delivery & postnatal
acl_perms.ipd_medication__read: IPD Medication: view hub, treatments, charts & audit
acl_perms.ipd_medication__write: IPD Medication: prescribe, administer, shift & discharge
acl_perms.nursing__write: Nursing: record vitals, ward notes & tasks
acl_perms.adt__read: ADT: view admissions, beds & IPD census
acl_perms.procurement__read: Procurement: view vendors, RFQ, PO & receipts
acl_perms.procurement__write: Procurement: create vendors, PO & goods receipt
acl_perms.assets__read: Assets: view hospital assets, apartments & rentals
acl_perms.assets__write: Assets: register assets, units, contracts & payments
acl_perms.payment__validity__read: Payment validity: view OPD slip rules
acl_perms.payment__validity__write: Payment validity: edit OPD slip rules
acl_perms.financials__read: Financials: view P&L, balance sheet, reports
acl_perms.credit__read: Credit & AR: view receivables & credit notes
acl_perms.profile__self__write: My profile: edit own account & password
acl_perms.hr__self__read: HR self-service: my leave, payslips & attendance
acl_perms.payroll__write: Payroll & HR: edit payroll & post salaries
acl_perms.hr__leave__approve: HR admin: leave approvals, balances & holidays
acl_perms.subscriptions__manage: Subscriptions: request and activate solution licenses
acl_perms.hms_reports__read: Management reports: open module (any granted section)
acl_perms.hms_reports__full: Management reports: full director suite (all sections & cards)
